title: Double Jump
description: Adds a simple double jump to your world! Default key is : R
body:
Double Jump

Jump higher, move faster, and add a smooth mobility boost to your gameplay!
This mod allows players to double jump—giving you an extra leap while in mid-air.

How It Works

Press R (default) while in the air to perform the second jump.

You can change the keybind anytime in
Options → Controls → Misc.

Perfect for parkour maps, exploration, combat mobility, or just having fun bouncing around your world!

Enjoy your upgraded movement! 🚀
